mapper.sql: SELECT r.return_id, r.return_no, r.order_id, r.customer_id, r.return_amount, r.return_reason, r.return_status, r.refund_amount, r.refund_date, r.approve_opinion, r.approve_by, r.approve_time, r.del_flag, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time, r.remark, c.customer_name, o.order_no FROM mk_order_return r LEFT JOIN mk_customer c ON r.customer_id = c.customer_id LEFT JOIN mk_order o ON r.order_id = o.order_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO mk_order_return (return_no, order_id, customer_id, return_amount, return_reason, return_status, refund_amount, refund_date, approve_opinion, approve_by, approve_time, del_flag, create_by, create_time, remark) VALUES (#{returnNo}, #{orderId}, #{customerId}, #{returnAmount}, #{returnReason}, #{returnStatus}, #{refundAmount}, #{refundDate}, #{approveOpinion}, #{approveBy}, #{approveTime}, '0', #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{remark})
mapper.delete: UPDATE mk_order_return SET del_flag = '2' WHERE return_id IN #{returnId}
